content.title: Evacuation Protocol
content.abstractText: Standard evacuation procedures for urban emergencies.
content.content: In case of emergency, follow these steps: 1. Stay calm. 2. Exit via designated routes. 3. Gather at the muster point.

content.title: Missing Person Reporting Guide
content.abstractText: How to file a missing person report correctly.
content.content: To file a missing person report: 1. Gather all available identification. 2. Collect last known location. 3. Submit through the TrackNest portal.
